caption: A man in a red shirt is escorted through a hallway by several individuals in tan police uniforms. In the initial scene, a police officer points forward, directing the man in red as they move through a crowded area where others observe. The man in red appears distressed, with a strained facial expression as he is guided along. As the sequence progresses, the group continues to walk, with the police officers maintaining their hold on him. The hallway setting is narrow, and other people are visible in the background. A digital fire overlay effect obscures a large portion of the lower half of the frame throughout the entire clip, with flickering orange and yellow flames appearing across the foreground. No legible on-screen text or logos are visible.
